items.reason: Deterministic in-memory lookup of demo booking data by confirmation code. May be mocked to inject scenario-specific bookings or left live for the built-in demo data.
Deterministic pure function returning the demo baggage policy for a ticket type. May be mocked to vary policy text or left live.
Mutates the in-memory demo bookings map, so mocking keeps seat-change scenarios deterministic and free of cross-turn state changes.
